home.hero_subtitle: The first AI-powered diagnostic platform built for the Rwandan climate. Protect your harvest in English & Kinyarwanda.
home.future_title: The Future of Farming in Rwanda.
home.future_desc: We've combined world-class AI with local agricultural knowledge to give you a 24/7 farming companion.
home.instant_scans_desc: Just point your phone camera at a leaf. Our AI identifies diseases in seconds with 98% accuracy.
home.ai_chat_desc: Interact with a smart assistant that understands Rwandan soil and climate. Available 24/7 in Kinyarwanda.
home.yield_opt_desc: Get personalized treatment plans and preventive measures to maximize your tomato production.
home.yield_increase_desc: Average increase in production for farmers using AI-guided diagnosis.
home.zero_waste_desc: Early detection prevents the spread of diseases, saving entire farm sections.
home.join_desc: Join 500+ Rwandan farmers today. Get started with 15 days of premium AI-powered diagnosis absolutely free.

how_it_works.title: How TomatoDoc Works
how_it_works.subtitle: A simple 5-step process to protect your tomato crops using advanced AI technology.
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Create your account and verify your email via the 6-digit OTP sent to you.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: Start with a 15-day free trial or choose a daily, weekly, or monthly plan.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: Take a photo of the affected tomato leaf or upload an existing image from your gallery.
how_it_works.step_4_desc: Our AI analyzes the image and provides instant diagnosis, severity, causes, and treatment.
how_it_works.step_5_desc: If you need more help, connect directly with agricultural experts via WhatsApp, Email, or Phone.

auth.otp_sent: A 6-digit code has been sent to your email.

dashboard.no_history: No chat history yet. Start your first diagnosis!

detection.title: Disease Detection
detection.upload_desc: Upload a photo of a tomato leaf showing symptoms for instant diagnosis.

payment.title: Subscription Payment
payment.success_desc: Your payment proof has been received and is currently being reviewed. Your subscription will be activated within 24 hours.

experts.title: Agricultural Experts
experts.desc: Connect with certified specialists in tomato farming across Rwanda.
experts.apply_desc: Join our network and help farmers across Rwanda.
